visual-anti-patterns.notes: One anti-pattern: some auxiliary text (dates, 'Select an object first', '0 objects placed') appears smaller than 16px

visual-child-friendly.notes: Big tappable object buttons with emoji+label, playful tone, calm palette, low text density; minor dock for compact theme selector buttons

visual-consistency.notes: Consistent purple accent, rounded corners, and sans-serif type across all pages; slight drift between landing gradient title style and utilitarian builder header

visual-accessibility.notes: Good dark-on-light contrast throughout, visible selection ring on active theme button, text labels on object palette; FAB and chat send button are icon-only, no responsive layout evidence
